revision.text:
{{navbox | name = Pam see also documentation | title = Templates for [[WP:proposed article mergers|proposed article mergers]] | bodyclass = plainlist | state = {{{state|collapsed}}} | group1 = Article page
PAM notice | list1 = * {{tl|Afd-merge required}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page but unclear destination consensus) * {{tl|Afd-merge to}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page; use {{tl|Afd-merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge}} (PAM; for source page) * {{tl|Merge portions from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Split portions}} on source page) * {{tl|Split portions}} ((PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge portions from}} on destination page) * {{tl|R from merge}} (Redirect from a merge) | group2 = User talk page
PAM discussion notifications | list2 = * {{tl|Mergenote}} (PAM notification to user talk page) | group3 = Discussion page
PAM templates | list3 = * {{tl|Canvassed}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Closing}} (closing in process) * {{tl|Duplicate vote}} (participation clarification) * {{tl|Not a ballot}} (discussion clarification) * {{tl|Page creator}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Single-purpose account}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Xfd-privacy}} (sensitive discussion close) | group4 = User talk page
PAM process notifications | list4 = ** {{tl|Uw-notvote}} (warning) | group5 = Article source talk page
PAM notice | list5 = * {{tl|Merge done}} (Merge after discussion notice; for source talk page) * {{tl|Merge to}} (PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merged-to}} (Post PAM merge completed; for source talk page) * {{tl|Being merged}} (Source page merging in action notice) * {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} (Post MfD merge needed; for source talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on destination page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group6 = Article destination talk page
PAM notice | list6 = * {{tl|Blank and redirect notice}} (Post [[WP:BLAR]]; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Afd-merge from}} (Post AfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Afd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Copied}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page with attribution remaining on source page) * {{tl|History merge}} (Post PAM history merge still needed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Merge to}} on source talk page) * {{tl|Merged-from}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Mfd-merge from}} (Post MfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group7 = Miscellaneous
PAM misc. | list7 = * {{tl|Merge progress}} (Merge progress counter for [[:Category:Articles to be merged]] subpages) | below = * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[Template:Proposed deletion templates|Templates for proposed deletions]]''' * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[Template:Speedy deletion templates|Templates for speedy deletions]]''' | belowclass=hlist }} {{Documentation}}

PAM notice | list1 = * {{tl|Afd-merge required}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page but unclear destination consensus) * {{tl|Afd-merge to}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page; use {{tl|Afd-merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge}} (PAM; for source page) * {{tl|Merge portions from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Split portions}} on source page) * {{tl|Split portions}} ((PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge portions from}} on destination page) * {{tl|R from merge}} (Redirect from a merge) | group2 = User talk page
PAM discussion notifications | list2 = * {{tl|Mergenote}} (PAM notification to user talk page) | group3 = Discussion page
PAM templates | list3 = * {{tl|Canvassed}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Closing}} (closing in process) * {{tl|Duplicate vote}} (participation clarification) * {{tl|Not a ballot}} (discussion clarification) * {{tl|Page creator}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Single-purpose account}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Xfd-privacy}} (sensitive discussion close) | group4 = User talk page
PAM process notifications | list4 = ** {{tl|Uw-notvote}} (warning) | group5 = Article source talk page
PAM notice | list5 = * {{tl|Merge done}} (Merge after discussion notice; for source talk page) * {{tl|Merge to}} (PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merged-to}} (Post PAM merge completed; for source talk page) * {{tl|Being merged}} (Source page merging in action notice) * {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} (Post MfD merge needed; for source talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on destination page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group6 = Article destination talk page
PAM notice | list6 = * {{tl|Blank and redirect notice}} (Post [[WP:BLAR]]; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Afd-merge from}} (Post AfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Afd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Copied}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page with attribution remaining on source page) * {{tl|History merge}} (Post PAM history merge still needed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Merge to}} on source talk page) * {{tl|Merged-from}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Mfd-merge from}} (Post MfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group7 = Miscellaneous
PAM misc. | list7 = * {{tl|Merge progress}} (Merge progress counter for [[:category:Articles to be merged]] subpages) | below = * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[Template:Proposed deletion templates|Templates for proposed deletions]]''' * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[Template:Speedy deletion templates|Templates for speedy deletions]]''' | belowclass=hlist }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 8]] [[sn:Pam see also documentation]][[Category:11-Template-11]] [[en:Pam see also documentation]][[category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[category:Pam see also documentation]][[category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[en:Template:Pam see also documentation]][[en:Pam see also documentation]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]][[Category:New]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Pam see also documentation]][[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Pam see also documentation]][[Category:unused templates]] [[Category:New]]

{{navbox | name = Pam see also documentation | title = Templates for [[WP:proposed article mergers|proposed article mergers]] | bodyclass = plainlist | state = {{{state|collapsed}}} | group1 = Article page
PAM notice | list1 = * {{tl|Afd-merge required}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page but unclear destination consensus) * {{tl|Afd-merge to}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page; use {{tl|Afd-merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge}} (PAM; for source page) * {{tl|Merge portions from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Split portions}} on source page) * {{tl|Split portions}} ((PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge portions from}} on destination page) * {{tl|R from merge}} (Redirect from a merge) | group2 = User talk page
PAM discussion notifications | list2 = * {{tl|Mergenote}} (PAM notification to user talk page) | group3 = Discussion page
PAM templates | list3 = * {{tl|Canvassed}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Closing}} (closing in process) * {{tl|Duplicate vote}} (participation clarification) * {{tl|Not a ballot}} (discussion clarification) * {{tl|Page creator}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Single-purpose account}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Xfd-privacy}} (sensitive discussion close) | group4 = User talk page
PAM process notifications | list4 = ** {{tl|Uw-notvote}} (warning) | group5 = Article source talk page
PAM notice | list5 = * {{tl|Merge done}} (Merge after discussion notice; for source talk page) * {{tl|Merge to}} (PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merged-to}} (Post PAM merge completed; for source talk page) * {{tl|Being merged}} (Source page merging in action notice) * {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} (Post MfD merge needed; for source talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on destination page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group6 = Article destination talk page
PAM notice | list6 = * {{tl|Blank and redirect notice}} (Post [[WP:BLAR]]; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Afd-merge from}} (Post AfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Afd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Copied}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page with attribution remaining on source page) * {{tl|History merge}} (Post PAM history merge still needed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Merge to}} on source talk page) * {{tl|Merged-from}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Mfd-merge from}} (Post MfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group7 = Miscellaneous
PAM misc. | list7 = * {{tl|Merge progress}} (Merge progress counter for [[:category:Articles to be merged]] subpages) | below = * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[Template:Proposed deletion templates|Templates for proposed deletions]]''' * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[Template:Speedy deletion templates|Templates for speedy deletions]]''' | belowclass=hlist }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 8]] [[sn:Pam see also documentation]][[Category:11-Template-11]] [[en:Pam see also documentation]][[category:Pam see also documentation]][[en:Template:Pam see also documentation]][[en:Pam see also documentation]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]][[Category:New]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Pam see also documentation]][[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[sn:Pam see also documentation]][[Category:unused templates]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{navbox | name = Pam see also documentation | title = Templates for [[WP:proposed article mergers|proposed article mergers]] | bodyclass = plainlist | state = {{{state|collapsed}}} | group1 = Article page
PAM notice | list1 = * {{tl|Afd-merge required}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page but unclear destination consensus) * {{tl|Afd-merge to}} (Post PAM merge needed; for source page; use {{tl|Afd-merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge}} (PAM; for source page) * {{tl|Merge portions from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Split portions}} on source page) * {{tl|Split portions}} ((PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge portions from}} on destination page) * {{tl|R from merge}} (Redirect from a merge) | group2 = User talk page
PAM discussion notifications | list2 = * {{tl|Mergenote}} (PAM notification to user talk page) | group3 = Discussion page
PAM templates | list3 = * {{tl|Canvassed}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Closing}} (closing in process) * {{tl|Duplicate vote}} (participation clarification) * {{tl|Not a ballot}} (discussion clarification) * {{tl|Page creator}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Single-purpose account}} (participant clarification) * {{tl|Xfd-privacy}} (sensitive discussion close) | group4 = User talk page
PAM process notifications | list4 = ** {{tl|Uw-notvote}} (warning) | group5 = Article source talk page
PAM notice | list5 = * {{tl|Merge done}} (Merge after discussion notice; for source talk page) * {{tl|Merge to}} (PAM merge request; for source page; use {{tl|Merge from}} on destination talk page) * {{tl|Merged-to}} (Post PAM merge completed; for source talk page) * {{tl|Being merged}} (Source page merging in action notice) * {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} (Post MfD merge needed; for source talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on destination page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group6 = Article destination talk page
PAM notice | list6 = * {{tl|Blank and redirect notice}} (Post [[WP:BLAR]]; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Afd-merge from}} (Post AfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Afd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Copied}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page with attribution remaining on source page) * {{tl|History merge}} (Post PAM history merge still needed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Merge from}} (PAM merge request; for destination page; use {{tl|Merge to}} on source talk page) * {{tl|Merged-from}} (Post PAM merge completed; for destination talk page) * {{tl|Mfd-merge from}} (Post MfD merge needed; for destination talk page; use {{tl|Mfd-merge to}} on source page) * {{tl|Old merge}} (1st and subsequent nominations) | group7 = Miscellaneous
PAM misc. | list7 = * {{tl|Merge progress}} (Merge progress counter for [[:Category:Articles to be merged]] subpages) | below = * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[:en:Template:Proposed deletion templates|Templates for proposed deletions]]''' * {{icon|TEMP}} '''[[:en:Template:Speedy deletion templates|Templates for speedy deletions]]''' | belowclass=hlist }} {{Documentation}}
